repoContext: Intent Studio serves as the primary demo runtime for test status visualization.
adaptiveBoundaries: Indicator must integrate with existing Studio lifecycle hooks without disrupting current test execution flows.
minimumSuccess: Visual indicator appears in Studio during test runs, displaying accurate status and state codes.
baseline: Current Intent Studio UI lacks real-time test status feedback.
verificationObligations: Verify indicator visibility across both light and dark theme modes using the shared dark query-param contract.
